skill.name: theme-factory
skill.description: Toolkit for styling artifacts with professionally curated themes. Apply consistent colors and fonts to slides, documents, and HTML pages.
skill.summary: Apply 10 pre-designed professional themes with curated color palettes and font pairings to presentations, documents, and web content.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All static analysis findings are false positives. The skill contains only markdown documentation files describing color themes and font pairings. No executable code is present. Markdown backticks were incorrectly flagged as shell execution. URLs in LICENSE.txt are standard Apache 2.0 license references. This is a documentation-only skill with no security risks.

content.user_title: Apply Professional Themes to Your Content
content.value_statement: Creating polished presentations and documents requires design expertise. Theme Factory provides 10 professionally curated themes with coordinated colors and fonts for instant visual impact.
actual_capabilities: Display theme showcase PDF with all 10 available themes
Apply curated color palettes with hex codes to content
Specify complementary font pairings for headers and body text
Generate custom themes based on user preferences
Support multiple output formats including slides, documents, and HTML
limitations: Requires theme-showcase.pdf file to be present for visual theme preview
Themes are predefined and cannot be modified without creating new theme files
Does not automatically apply themes to external files or applications
Custom theme creation requires manual review before application

use_cases.title: Business Presentation Styling
use_cases.description: Apply professional themes to corporate slide decks for consistent branding and visual appeal.

use_cases.title: Document Design Enhancement
use_cases.description: Style reports, proposals, and documentation with cohesive color schemes and typography.

use_cases.title: Web Landing Page Theming
use_cases.description: Apply coordinated design themes to HTML landing pages for rapid prototyping.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Theme Selection
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the theme showcase PDF so I can choose a theme for my presentation.
prompt_templates.scenario: First-time user wants to browse available themes

prompt_templates.title: Apply Specific Theme
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Ocean Depths theme to my slide deck with the color palette and fonts specified.
prompt_templates.scenario: User has selected a preferred theme and wants it applied

prompt_templates.title: Custom Theme Creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a custom theme for a nature conservation presentation with earth tones and accessible fonts.
prompt_templates.scenario: Existing themes do not match specific content requirements

prompt_templates.title: Theme Comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare the Modern Minimalist and Tech Innovation themes for a software product launch deck.
prompt_templates.scenario: User needs help deciding between multiple theme options

output_examples.input: Apply Arctic Frost theme to presentation
output_examples.output: Applied Arctic Frost theme with Ice Blue (#d4e4f7), Steel Blue (#4a6fa5), Silver (#c0c0c0), and Crisp White (#fafafa) colors. Headers use DejaVu Sans Bold, body text uses DejaVu Sans.

output_examples.input: Create custom theme for finance presentation
output_examples.output: Generated 'Corporate Trust' theme: Navy (#1e3a5f), Charcoal (#36454f), Gold (#d4af37), and Cream (#f5f5dc). Headers: Georgia Bold. Body: Georgia. Conveys stability and professionalism.

best_practices: Always preview the theme showcase PDF before selecting to ensure visual alignment with content goals
Verify color contrast ratios meet accessibility standards for your audience
Maintain consistent theme application across all slides or document sections
anti_patterns: Do not mix multiple themes within the same presentation or document
Avoid using themes with low contrast colors for accessibility-critical content
Do not apply themes without considering the target audience and content context

faq.question: How many themes are available in Theme Factory?
faq.answer: There are 10 pre-designed themes: Ocean Depths, Sunset Boulevard, Forest Canopy, Modern Minimalist, Golden Hour, Arctic Frost, Desert Rose, Tech Innovation, Botanical Garden, and Midnight Galaxy.

faq.question: Can I create my own custom theme?
faq.answer: Yes, Theme Factory supports custom theme creation. Provide your preferences for colors, mood, or use case, and a new theme will be generated for your review before application.

faq.question: What file formats can I apply themes to?
faq.answer: Themes can be applied to presentation slide decks, documents, reports, HTML landing pages, and any other text-based artifact that supports color and font styling.

faq.question: Do the themes include font specifications?
faq.answer: Yes, each theme includes carefully selected font pairings with specific fonts for headers and body text to ensure visual harmony and readability.

faq.question: What if none of the existing themes match my needs?
faq.answer: You can request a custom theme. Describe your content type, desired mood, or any specific color preferences, and Theme Factory will generate a tailored theme for you.

faq.question: How do I preview themes before applying them?
faq.answer: The theme-showcase.pdf file provides visual previews of all 10 themes. Request to view this file first to see color palettes and overall aesthetics before making a selection.
